message:
fix(fsqlite-vfs): release DMS lock during SHM cleanup

The deadman switch lock at byte 128 was not being released when
cleaning up shared memory ownership, potentially leaving stale POSIX
locks that prevent other processes from connecting to the database.

Add DMS lock release for both exclusive owner and shared holder paths
in the SHM cleanup logic, with proper posix_unlock calls and error
propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
